37: 
38: public class PubSubLiteSinkTask extends SinkTask {
39: 
40:     private final PublisherFactory factory;
41: 
42:     @Nullable
43:     private Publisher<Void> publisher;
44: 
45:     @VisibleForTesting
46:     PubSubLiteSinkTask(PublisherFactory factory) {
47:         this.factory = factory;
48:     }
49: 
50:     public PubSubLiteSinkTask() {
51:         this(new PublisherFactoryImpl());
52:     }
53: 
54:     @Override
55:     public String version() {
56:         return AppInfoParser.getVersion();
57:     }
58: 
59:     @Override
60:     public void start(Map<String, String> map) {
61:         if (publisher != null) {
62:             throw new IllegalStateException("Called start when publisher already exists.");
63:         }
64:         publisher = factory.newPublisher(map);
65:         publisher.startAsync().awaitRunning();
66:     }
67: 
68:     @Override
69:     public void put(Collection<SinkRecord> collection) {
70:         if (publisher.state() != State.RUNNING) {
71:             if (publisher.state() == State.FAILED) {
72:                 throw new IllegalStateException("Publisher has failed.", publisher.failureCause());
73:             } else {
74:                 throw new IllegalStateException("Publisher not currently running.");
75:             }
76:         }
77:         for (SinkRecord record : collection) {
78:             Message.Builder message = Message.builder();
79:             if (record.key() != null) {
80:                 message.setKey(encodeToBytes(record.keySchema(), record.key()));
81:             }
82:             if (record.value() != null) {
83:                 message.setData(encodeToBytes(record.valueSchema(), record.value()));
84:             }
85:             ImmutableListMultimap.Builder<String, ByteString> attributes = ImmutableListMultimap.builder();
86:             getRecordHeaders(record).forEach(header -> attributes.put(header.key(), Schemas.encodeToBytes(header.schema(), header.value())));
87:             if (record.topic() != null) {
88:                 attributes.put(Constants.KAFKA_TOPIC_HEADER, ByteString.copyFromUtf8(record.topic()));
89:             }
90:             if (record.kafkaPartition() != null) {
91:                 attributes.put(Constants.KAFKA_PARTITION_HEADER, ByteString.copyFromUtf8(record.kafkaPartition().toString()));
92:                 attributes.put(Constants.KAFKA_OFFSET_HEADER, ByteString.copyFromUtf8(Long.toString(record.kafkaOffset())));
93:             }
94:             if (record.timestamp() != null) {
95:                 attributes.put(Constants.KAFKA_EVENT_TIME_TYPE_HEADER, ByteString.copyFromUtf8(record.timestampType().name));
96:                 message.setEventTime(Timestamps.fromMillis(record.timestamp()));
97:             }
98:             message.setAttributes(attributes.build());
99:             publisher.publish(message.build());
100:         }
101:     }
102: 
103:     private Iterable<? extends Header> getRecordHeaders(SinkRecord record) {
104:         ConnectHeaders headers = new ConnectHeaders();
105:         if (record.headers() != null) {
106:             for (Header header : record.headers()) {
107:                 headers.add(header);
108:             }
109:         }
110:         return headers;
111:     }
112: 
113:     @Override
114:     public void flush(Map<TopicPartition, OffsetAndMetadata> currentOffsets) {
115:         try {
116:             if (publisher != null) {
117:                 publisher.flush();
118:             }
119:         } catch (IOException e) {
120:             throw new RuntimeException(e);
121:         }
122:     }
123: 
124:     @Override
125:     public void stop() {
126:         if (publisher == null) {
127:             throw new IllegalStateException("Called stop when publisher doesn't exist.");
128:         }
129:         try {
130:             publisher.flush();
131:             publisher.stopAsync().awaitTerminated();
132:         } catch (IOException e) {
133:             throw new RuntimeException(e);
134:         } finally {
135:             publisher = null;
136:         }
137:     }
138: }
